title: Not Really Vanilla? [Discontinued]
description: A modpack that not only improves vanilla aspects but also adds a few new modded elements while keeping the Minecraft vibe.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93525297c9c0dc8359b601d304cace17e1a4724a_0.webp)

**'Not Really Vanilla?' is a modpack that adds elements to enhance vanilla minecraft as well as a short few of other mods that I feel fit Minecraft. Please note that this modpack is not just vanilla plus and does have some actual mods.**

**8gbs of ram is reccomended for the game to work properly.**

![Features Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca10d3a2923e8b6fe0e4ffb643d3e89b2490c73b_0.webp)

**✔️ 202 Mods**

**✔️ Lite Version**

**✔️ 5 Resource Packs**

**✔️ 3 Shaders**

**✔️ Mobs from past mob votes**

**✔️ Modded cooking & farming system**

**✔️ Almost Overhauled combat system**

**✔️ Enhanced terrain generation**

**✔️ Optimized Gameplay**

**✔️ New weaponry and armors**

**✔️ Multiplayer Support (e4mc)**

**✔️ Features to build off & enhance the vanilla experience**

## 
**Join the discord for support for mods!**
[![Join Our Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e94fb1e2a5bedd5eb375afe2d7d060cbac174b.webp)](https://discord.gg/xnqvcNDpRV)
